channel.title: PyTorch on Aneesh Mokashi
channel.description: Recent content in PyTorch on Aneesh Mokashi

item.title: Optimizing Transformer-Based Time Series Forecasting
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: PyTorch optimization work incorporating FlashAttention into Temporal Fusion Transformer training

item.title: ResNet-34 Custom Implementation for CIFAR-10
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Lightweight ResNet-34 variant optimized for CIFAR-10 image classification and resource-constrained deployment

item.title: RoBERTa LoRA Fine-Tuning
item.author: aneeshkmokashi@gmail.com (Aneesh Mokashi)
item.description: Parameter-efficient RoBERTa-base fine-tuning with LoRA for AG News text classification
